meaning: n.一家人,家庭,家族,王室adj.家庭的,家族的,家属的,普通的,平常的
examples: She became a household name in the 1960s.
Today, fashion designers are household names.
Many household products give off noxious fumes.
Aubel recalled that it was firmly decided that Welsh would be the language of the household.
With the economy being as it is, it takes both adults in an average household, to work.
